violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration of the sanitizing solution dispenser at the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Ware-washing procedures reviewed with PIC at the time of inspection. Establishment to manually use chlorine sanitizing solution until the sanitizer dispenser is recalibrated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
A strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as avocados) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Chicken, carnitas and other items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Wood observed under the food prep unit. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
The left door of the prep unit was observed in poor repair (door loose/detached from unit). Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
